```{r}
#write.csv(df_cor_long_DAibd_sigs, paste0(PATHanalNov2023,"Downstream/Results/MGScorvsDAibd.csv"))
})
names(df_cor_long_DAibd_sigs_l_long_CTRL)<-names(numSigCorr.l_long_CTRL)

df_cor_long_DAibd_sigs2_l_long_CTRL<-lapply(numSigCorr.l_long_CTRL, function (x){
  df_cor_long_DAibd_sigs2<-x%>%
    mutate(sigcorr=ifelse(padjust<qval,"significant","notSignificant"))%>%
    filter(sigcorr=="significant")%>%  
    filter(num_sigcorr>1)%>%  
    mutate(rho2=rho)%>%
    gather(measure,effect,c(rho,meanTE))%>%
    arrange(MGS, rho2)
  
  df_cor_long_DAibd_sigs2
})
names(df_cor_long_DAibd_sigs2_l_long_CTRL)<-names(numSigCorr.l_long_CTRL)

# save table with all info
df_cor_long_DAibd_all_l_long_CTRL<-lapply(numSigCorr.l_long_CTRL, function (x){
  df_cor_long_DAibd_all<-x%>%
    full_join(da_all.sig, by="MGS")
  df_cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs<-df_cor_long_DAibd_all%>%
    mutate(sigcorr=ifelse(padjust<qval,"significant","notSignificant"))%>%
    filter(sigcorr=="significant")%>%  
    mutate(rho2=rho)%>%
    gather(measure,effect,c(rho,meanTE.IBDHC,meanTE.CDHC,meanTE.UCHC,meanTE.CDUC))%>%
    arrange(MGS, rho2)
  
  df_cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs
})
names(df_cor_long_DAibd_all_l_long_CTRL)<-names(numSigCorr.l_long_CTRL)

```

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=2}
#x<-df_cor_long_DAibd_all_l_long$Sample6

p_cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs.list_CTRL<-lapply(df_cor_long_DAibd_all_l_long_CTRL, function (x){
  x.df<-x%>%
    mutate(meanTE=ifelse(measure=="rho",NA,effect))%>%
    mutate(effect=ifelse(IBDHC=="non-sig" & measure=="meanTE.IBDHC",NA,effect))%>%
    mutate(effect=ifelse(CDHC=="non-sig" & measure=="meanTE.CDHC",NA,effect))%>%
    mutate(effect=ifelse(UCHC=="non-sig" & measure=="meanTE.UCHC",NA,effect))%>%
    mutate(effect=ifelse(CDUC=="non-sig" & measure=="meanTE.CDUC",NA,effect))%>%
    mutate(robustDA=ifelse(measure=="meanTE.IBDHC",IBDHC,NA))%>%
    mutate(robustDA=ifelse(measure=="meanTE.CDHC",CDHC,robustDA))%>%
    mutate(robustDA=ifelse(measure=="meanTE.UCHC",UCHC,robustDA))%>%
    mutate(robustDA=ifelse(measure=="meanTE.CDUC",CDUC,robustDA))%>%
    mutate(robustDA=ifelse(is.na(robustDA),"corr",robustDA))
  
  x.df$effect<-as.numeric(x.df$effect)
  class(x.df$effect)
  
  p_cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs<-ggplot(x.df,aes(effect,reorder(gsub(".*;","",MGS),rho2),color=cohort,shape=robustDA))+
    geom_point(size=3, alpha=0.7) +
    facet_grid(.~measure, scales = "free_x") +
    ylab("MGS") +
    theme_bw()
  p_cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs
})

#p_cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs.list_CTRL$Sample1

```

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=7}
#x<-df_cor_long_DAibd_all_l_long$Sample6

cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs.list_CTRL<-lapply(names(df_cor_long_DAibd_all_l_long_CTRL), function (x){
  x.df<-df_cor_long_DAibd_all_l_long_CTRL[[x]]%>%
    mutate(meanTE=ifelse(measure=="rho",NA,effect))%>%
    mutate(effect=ifelse(IBDHC=="non-sig" & measure=="meanTE.IBDHC",NA,effect))%>%
    mutate(effect=ifelse(CDHC=="non-sig" & measure=="meanTE.CDHC",NA,effect))%>%
    mutate(effect=ifelse(UCHC=="non-sig" & measure=="meanTE.UCHC",NA,effect))%>%
    mutate(effect=ifelse(CDUC=="non-sig" & measure=="meanTE.CDUC",NA,effect))%>%
    mutate(robustDA=ifelse(measure=="meanTE.IBDHC",IBDHC,NA))%>%
    mutate(robustDA=ifelse(measure=="meanTE.CDHC",CDHC,robustDA))%>%
    mutate(robustDA=ifelse(measure=="meanTE.UCHC",UCHC,robustDA))%>%
    mutate(robustDA=ifelse(measure=="meanTE.CDUC",CDUC,robustDA))%>%
    mutate(robustDA=ifelse(is.na(robustDA),"corr",robustDA))%>%
    mutate(sample=x)
  
  x.df$effect<-as.numeric(x.df$effect)
  x.df
})
names(cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs.list_CTRL)<-names(df_cor_long_DAibd_all_l_long_CTRL)

cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs.df_CTRL<-do.call(rbind,cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs.list_CTRL)


p_cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL<-ggplot(cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs.df_CTRL,aes(effect,reorder(gsub(".*;","",MGS),rho2),color=cohort,shape=robustDA))+
    geom_point(size=3, alpha=0.7) +
    facet_grid(.~measure, scales = "free_x") +
    ylab("MGS") +
    theme_bw()
p_cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL
```

```{r}
all(names(df_cor_cross_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL%>%mutate(sample="cross"))==names(cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs.df_CTRL%>%select(-num_sigcorr)))
df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL<-rbind(df_cor_cross_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL%>%mutate(sample="cross"),cor_long_DAibd_all_sigs.df_CTRL%>%select(-num_sigcorr))
length(unique(df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL$MGS)) 
write.csv(df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL, paste0(PATHanalNov2023,"Downstream/Results/MGScorvsDAibd.crosslong.CTRLonly.q0.1.csv"))
saveRDS(df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL, paste0(PATHanalNov2023,"humanReads/MGScorvsDAibd.crosslong.CTRLonly.q0.1.rds"))


testdf_CTRL<-df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL%>%
  filter(robustDA=="corr")%>%
  group_by(MGS,cohort)%>%
  count()

# how many MGS more than 1 cohort
testdf_CTRL%>%group_by(MGS)%>%count()%>%filter(n>1)%>%nrow()

# direction
testdf2_CTRL<-df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL%>%
  filter(robustDA=="corr")%>%
  mutate(direction=ifelse(rho2<0,"negative","positive"))%>%
  select(MGS,direction)%>%
  group_by(MGS,direction)%>%
  count()
# positive
testdf2_CTRL%>%filter(direction=="positive")%>%nrow()
# negative
testdf2_CTRL%>%filter(direction=="negative")%>%nrow()
# which MGS have discrepancy
testdf2_CTRL%>%group_by(MGS)%>%count()%>%filter(n>1)
```

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
p_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL<-ggplot(df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL%>%
   mutate(measure=ifelse(measure=="meanTE.IBDHC","meanTE IBD - control",measure))%>%
   mutate(measure=ifelse(measure=="meanTE.CDHC","meanTE CD - control",measure))%>%
   mutate(measure=ifelse(measure=="meanTE.UCHC","meanTE UC - control",measure))%>%
   mutate(measure=ifelse(measure=="meanTE.CDUC","meanTE CD - UC",measure)),
   aes(effect,reorder(gsub(".*;","",gsub(";MGS."," MGS.",MGS)),rho2),color=cohort,shape=robustDA))+
    geom_point(size=3, alpha=0.7) +
    facet_grid(.~measure, scales = "free_x") +
    ylab("MGS") +
    theme_bw()
p_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL
```


```{r fig.width=7, fig.height=6}
df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL<-df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL%>%
  filter(!is.na(effect))%>%
  select(c(MGS,cohort,measure,effect,sample))%>%
  spread(measure,effect)%>%
  gather(comparison,meanTE,c("meanTE.CDUC","meanTE.IBDHC","meanTE.UCHC","meanTE.CDHC"))%>%
  mutate(comparison=gsub("meanTE.","",comparison))%>%
  mutate(comparison=gsub("HC"," vs. control",comparison))%>%
  mutate(comparison=gsub("CDUC","CD vs. UC",comparison))

(df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(!is.na(meanTE)))$MGS%>%unique()%>%length()

p2_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL<-ggplot(df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL,aes(rho,meanTE))+
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se = FALSE, color="grey70", size=1)+
    geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7, aes(color=cohort)) +
    facet_wrap(.~comparison, scales = "free_x") +
    ylab("Mean differential abundance effect size (mean TE)") +
    theme_bw()
p2_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL

```


```{r}
df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL$comparison%>%unique()


cduc_dfcorr_CTRL<-df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="CD vs. UC")
cdhc_dfcorr_CTRL<-df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="CD vs. control")
uchc_dfcorr_CTRL<-df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="UC vs. control")
ibd_dfcorr_CTRL<-df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="IBD vs. control")

lm_cduc_CTRL<-lmerTest::lmer(meanTE ~ rho + (1|cohort), data=cduc_dfcorr_CTRL)
lm_cdhc_CTRL<-lmerTest::lmer(meanTE ~ rho + (1|cohort), data=cdhc_dfcorr_CTRL)
lm_uchc_CTRL<-lmerTest::lmer(meanTE ~ rho + (1|cohort), data=uchc_dfcorr_CTRL)
lm_CTRL_CTRL<-lmerTest::lmer(meanTE ~ rho + (1|cohort), data=ibd_dfcorr_CTRL)

sum_lm_cduc_CTRL<-summary(lm_cduc_CTRL)
sum_lm_cdhc_CTRL<-summary(lm_cdhc_CTRL)
sum_lm_uchc_CTRL<-summary(lm_uchc_CTRL)
sum_lm_CTRL_CTRL<-summary(lm_CTRL_CTRL)

lm_meanTE_rho_CTRL<-data.frame(
  comparison=c("CD vs. UC","IBD vs. control","UC vs. control","CD vs. control"),
  p=c(sum_lm_cduc_CTRL$coefficients[2,5],sum_lm_CTRL_CTRL$coefficients[2,5],sum_lm_uchc_CTRL$coefficients[2,5],sum_lm_cdhc_CTRL$coefficients[2,5]),
  rho=c(sum_lm_cduc_CTRL$coefficients[2,1],sum_lm_CTRL_CTRL$coefficients[2,1],sum_lm_uchc_CTRL$coefficients[2,1],sum_lm_cdhc_CTRL$coefficients[2,1])
)
lm_meanTE_rho_CTRL$padjust<-p.adjust(lm_meanTE_rho_CTRL$p)
lm_meanTE_rho_CTRL

cor_cduc_CTRL<-cor.test((df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="CD vs. UC"))$meanTE, (df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="CD vs. UC"))$rho, use = "complete.obs", method="spearman")

cor_CTRL_CTRL<-cor.test((df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="IBD vs. control"))$meanTE, (df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="IBD vs. control"))$rho, use = "complete.obs", method="spearman")

cor_uchc_CTRL<-cor.test((df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="UC vs. control"))$meanTE, (df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="UC vs. control"))$rho, use = "complete.obs", method="spearman")

cor_cdhc_CTRL<-cor.test((df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="CD vs. control"))$meanTE, (df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="CD vs. control"))$rho, use = "complete.obs", method="spearman")

cor_meanTE_rho_CTRL<-data.frame(
  comparison=c("CD vs. UC","IBD vs. control","UC vs. control","CD vs. control"),
  p=c(cor_cduc_CTRL$p.value,cor_CTRL_CTRL$p.value,cor_uchc_CTRL$p.value,cor_cdhc_CTRL$p.value),
  rho=c(cor_cduc_CTRL$estimate,cor_CTRL_CTRL$estimate,cor_uchc_CTRL$estimate,cor_cdhc_CTRL$es)
)
cor_meanTE_rho_CTRL$padjust<-p.adjust(cor_meanTE_rho_CTRL$p)
cor_meanTE_rho_CTRL
```

## comapre IBD and CTRL rho

```{r}
df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_IBD_mod<-df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_IBD%>%
  mutate(group="IBD")
  
df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL_mod<-df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL%>%
  mutate(group="control")

df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_IBD_CTRL<-rbind(df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_IBD_mod,df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL_mod)

df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_IBD_mod2<-df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_IBD_mod%>%
  filter(measure=="rho")%>%
  select(c(MGS, rho2, pvalue, padjust, enrichedIn))
df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL_mod2<-df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_CTRL_mod%>%
  filter(measure=="rho")%>%
  select(c(MGS, rho2, pvalue, padjust, enrichedIn))
df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_IBD_CTRL_mod2<-df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_IBD_mod2%>%
  full_join(df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_IBD_mod2, by="MGS")

ggplot(df_cor_all_DAibd_all_sigs_IBD_CTRL_mod2, aes(x=rho2.x,y=rho2.y))+
  geom_point()
```


## correlation of Falks individual-blocked species

```{r}
MGScor_blInd<-read.table(paste0(PATHanalNov2023,"humanReads/ibd_ctrl_blockedInd_MGS.txt"), header=TRUE, check.names = FALSE, sep="\t")%>%
  mutate(MGS=`Feature name`)
MGScor_blInd$Direction<-as.numeric(MGScor_blInd$Direction)
MGScor_blInd$`q-value`<-as.numeric(MGScor_blInd$`q-value`)
MGScor_blInd_DA<-MGScor_blInd%>%
  left_join(da_all.sig, by="MGS")


MGScor_blInd_DA_gat<-MGScor_blInd_DA%>%
  filter(`q-value`<qval)%>%
  mutate(meanTE.CDHC=ifelse(CDHC=="non-sig",NA,meanTE.CDHC))%>%
  mutate(meanTE.UCHC=ifelse(UCHC=="non-sig",NA,meanTE.UCHC))%>%
  mutate(meanTE.CDUC=ifelse(CDUC=="non-sig",NA,meanTE.CDUC))%>%
  mutate(meanTE.IBDHC=ifelse(IBDHC=="non-sig",NA,meanTE.IBDHC))%>%
  gather(measure,effect,c(Direction,meanTE.IBDHC,meanTE.CDHC,meanTE.UCHC,meanTE.CDUC))%>%
  filter(!is.na(effect))%>%
  select(c(MGS,measure,effect))%>%
  spread(measure,effect)%>%
  gather(comparison,meanTE,c("meanTE.CDUC","meanTE.IBDHC","meanTE.UCHC","meanTE.CDHC"))%>%
  mutate(comparison=gsub("meanTE.","",comparison))%>%
  mutate(comparison=gsub("HC"," vs. control",comparison))%>%
  mutate(comparison=gsub("CDUC","CD vs. UC",comparison))
MGScor_blInd_DA_gat$Direction<-as.numeric(MGScor_blInd_DA_gat$Direction)
MGScor_blInd_DA_gat$meanTE<-as.numeric(MGScor_blInd_DA_gat$meanTE)

(MGScor_blInd_DA_gat%>%filter(!is.na(meanTE)))$MGS%>%unique()%>%length()

p2_cor_all_DAibd_blInd<-ggplot(MGScor_blInd_DA_gat,aes(Direction,meanTE))+
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se = FALSE, color="grey70", size=1)+
    geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
    facet_wrap(.~comparison, scales = "free_x") +
    ylab("Mean differential abundance effect size (mean TE)") +
    theme_bw()
p2_cor_all_DAibd_blInd
```

```{r}
cduc_dfcorr_blInd<-MGScor_blInd_DA_gat%>%filter(comparison=="CD vs. UC")
cdhc_dfcorr_blInd<-MGScor_blInd_DA_gat%>%filter(comparison=="CD vs. control")
uchc_dfcorr_blInd<-MGScor_blInd_DA_gat%>%filter(comparison=="UC vs. control")
ibd_dfcorr_blInd<-MGScor_blInd_DA_gat%>%filter(comparison=="IBD vs. control")

lm_cduc_blInd<-lm(meanTE ~ Direction, data=cduc_dfcorr_blInd)
lm_cdhc_blInd<-lm(meanTE ~ Direction, data=cdhc_dfcorr_blInd)
lm_uchc_blInd<-lm(meanTE ~ Direction, data=uchc_dfcorr_blInd)
lm_ibd_blInd<-lm(meanTE ~ Direction, data=ibd_dfcorr_blInd)

sum_lm_cduc_blInd<-summary(lm_cduc_blInd)
sum_lm_cdhc_blInd<-summary(lm_cdhc_blInd)
sum_lm_uchc_blInd<-summary(lm_uchc_blInd)
sum_lm_ibd_blInd<-summary(lm_ibd_blInd)

lm_meanTE_direction_blInd<-data.frame(
  comparison=c("CD vs. UC","IBD vs. control","UC vs. control","CD vs. control"),
  p=c(sum_lm_cduc_blInd$coefficients[2,4],sum_lm_ibd_blInd$coefficients[2,4],sum_lm_uchc_blInd$coefficients[2,4],sum_lm_cdhc_blInd$coefficients[2,4]),
  direction=c(sum_lm_cduc_blInd$coefficients[2,1],sum_lm_ibd_blInd$coefficients[2,1],sum_lm_uchc_blInd$coefficients[2,1],sum_lm_cdhc_blInd$coefficients[2,1])
)
lm_meanTE_direction_blInd$padjust<-p.adjust(lm_meanTE_direction_blInd$p)
lm_meanTE_direction_blInd
```

```{r}
saveRDS(df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE,paste0(PATHanalNov2023,"humanReads/df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE.q0.1.rds"))
saveRDS(df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_IBD,paste0(PATHanalNov2023,"humanReads/df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_IBD.q0.1.rds"))
saveRDS(df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL,paste0(PATHanalNov2023,"humanReads/df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL.q0.1.rds"))
saveRDS(MGScor_blInd_DA_gat,paste0(PATHanalNov2023,"humanReads/MGScor_blInd_DA_gat.q0.1.rds"))

p1_cor_all_DA<-ggplot(df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE%>%filter(comparison=="IBD vs. control"),aes(rho,meanTE))+
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se = FALSE, color="grey70", size=1)+
    geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
    #facet_wrap(.~comparison, scales = "free_x") +
    ylab("Mean differential abundance effect size (mean TE)") +
    theme_bw()+
    scale_x_reverse()+
  ggtitle("All individuals")
p1_cor_all_DA

p2_cor_ibd_DA<-ggplot(df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_IBD%>%filter(comparison=="IBD vs. control"),aes(rho,meanTE))+
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se = FALSE, color="grey70", size=1)+
    geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
    #facet_wrap(.~comparison, scales = "free_x") +
    ylab("Mean differential abundance effect size (mean TE)") +
    theme_bw()+
    scale_x_reverse()+
  ggtitle("IBD individuals")
p2_cor_ibd_DA

p3_cor_ibd_DA<-ggplot(df_cor_all_DAibd_rhoVSmeanTE_CTRL%>%filter(comparison=="IBD vs. control"),aes(rho,meanTE))+
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se = FALSE, color="grey70", size=1)+
    geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
    #facet_wrap(.~comparison, scales = "free_x") +
    ylab("Mean differential abundance effect size (mean TE)") +
    theme_bw()+
    scale_x_reverse()+
  ggtitle("Control individuals")
p3_cor_ibd_DA

p4_cor_blInd_DA<-ggplot(MGScor_blInd_DA_gat%>%filter(comparison=="IBD vs. control"),aes(Direction,meanTE))+
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se = FALSE, color="grey70", size=1)+
    geom_point(size=1, alpha=0.7) +
    #facet_wrap(.~comparison, scales = "free_x") +
    ylab("Mean differential abundance effect size (mean TE)") +
    theme_bw()+
    scale_x_reverse()+
  ggtitle("Blocked for individuals")
p4_cor_blInd_DA

plot_grid(p1_cor_all_DA,p2_cor_ibd_DA,p3_cor_ibd_DA,p4_cor_blInd_DA,nrow=1)
```

```{r}
corr_log_blocked<-function(taxa_abun, metaVar, var){
  #taxa_abun <- spec.cross
  #metaVar <- meta_hr
  #var <- "HumanRds"
    taxab.df<-taxa_abun
    testmgs.vec<-names(taxab.df%>%select(-cohort))
    #testmgs.vec<-names(taxab.df)[1:5] # debug
    taxmeta.df<-taxab.df%>%
      rownames_to_column("SmplID")%>%
      left_join(metaVar, by="SmplID")%>%
      filter(!is.na(!!sym(var)))

    cor_mgs<-lapply(testmgs.vec, function(m) {
     #m<-"Bacteria;Firmicutes_C;Negativicutes;Veillonellales;Megasphaeraceae;Megasphaera;Megasphaera sp000417505;MGS.966" # debug
      #m<-"Bacteria;Firmicutes_A;Clostridia;Lachnospirales;Lachnospiraceae;Faecalimonas;Faecalimonas sp900546325;MGS.1523 cohort"
      #print(m)
      taxab.vec<-taxmeta.df[,m]
      hr.vec<-as.numeric(c(taxmeta.df$HumanRds))
      cohort<-taxmeta.df$cohort
      
      class(taxab.vec)
      class(hr.vec)
      cohort<-as.factor(cohort)
      class(cohort)

      sd_taxab.vec<-sd(taxab.vec, na.rm = TRUE)
      sd_hr.vec<-sd(hr.vec, na.rm = TRUE)


      if(sd_taxab.vec == 0 | sd_hr.vec == 0){
        return(NULL)
      } else {
        tryCatch(
        {
          #cor_taxab_hr<-cor.test(formula= ~ taxab.vec + hr.vec | cohort, use = "complete.obs", method="spearman")
          #cor_taxab_hr<-lmerTest::lmer(taxab.vec ~ hr.vec +(1|cohort))
          cor_taxab_hr<-lmerTest::lmer(log2(taxab.vec+1) ~ log2(hr.vec+1) +(1|cohort))
          cor_taxab_hr_summary<-summary(cor_taxab_hr)
          
          
          #return(cor_taxab_hr)
          # Extract correlation coefficient and p-value
          corr_est <- cor_taxab_hr_summary$coefficients[2,1]
          corr_p <- cor_taxab_hr_summary$coefficients[2,5]
        },
        error = function(e) {
          message("Error: ", e$message)
          #return(NA)
          corr_rho <- NA
          corr_p <- NA
        })
        cor_cohort_tmp<-data.frame(
          MGS=m,
          pvalue=corr_p,
          estimate=corr_est
        )
        return(cor_cohort_tmp)
      }
    })
    names(cor_mgs)<-testmgs.vec
    cor_mgs<-cor_mgs[sapply(cor_mgs, function(x) !is.null(x))]
    cor_mgs_df<-do.call(rbind, cor_mgs)
    return(cor_mgs_df)
}


# crosssectional
glm_spec_hr_blocked_log<-corr_log_blocked(spec.cross,meta_hr,"HumanRds")
glm_spec_hr_blocked_log$padjust<-p.adjust(glm_spec_hr_blocked_log$pvalue, method="fdr")

#longitudinal
# make list with dataframe subset according to resampling
l_spec.long.subs<-lapply(names(df.row[1:20]), function(s){
  subsamps<-df.row[[s]]
  df_spec.samp<-spec.long[subsamps,]
  return(df_spec.samp)
})
names(l_spec.long.subs)<-names(df.row[1:20])

l_glm_blocked_long.resamp<-lapply(names(l_spec.long.subs), function(s){
  corr_long<-corr_blocked(l_spec.long.subs[[s]],meta_hr,"HumanRds")
  corr_long$padjust<-p.adjust(corr_long$pvalue, method="BH")
  return(corr_long)
})
names(l_glm_blocked_long.resamp)<-names(l_spec.long.subs)
l_glm_blocked_long.resamp$Sample3%>%View()

l_glm_blocked_long.resamp$Sample1%>%filter(padjust<qval)%>%nrow()
```
